meaning: vi.鬼鬼祟祟做事vt.偷偷摸摸地做,<口>偷窃n.鬼鬼祟祟的人,偷偷摸摸的行为,<美口>帆布胶底运动鞋adj.暗中进行的
examples: I managed to sneak him a note.
I managed to sneak a note to him.
You sneak a look at your watch to see how long you've got to wait.
We've got a sneak preview of Middle Cyclone on this edition of All Songs Considered.
And who managed to sneak ahead of the likes of Nokia, Blackberry and HTC?
